source.title: GMV Estimation Method 1: Revenue / Take Rate Back-Calculation

extractions.claim: METHOD 1 (Revenue / Take Rate): PDD's FY2024 consolidated GMV is estimated at RMB 5.3-6.6 trillion (US$730-900 billion)
extractions.evidence:
CALCULATION:

Step 1: Identify revenue segments
- FY2024 total revenue: RMB 393.84B (from XBRL)
- Revenue mix: ~55% online marketing services (~RMB 216.6B), ~45% transaction services (~RMB 177.2B)

Step 2: Estimate domestic vs international revenue
- Temu (international) estimated revenue: ~RMB 150-180B (based on Temu $50B+ GMV at ~35% take rate for fully-managed, ~15% for semi-managed, blended ~25-30%)
- Domestic Pinduoduo revenue: ~RMB 213-244B (remainder)

Step 3: Apply take rates to back-calculate GMV
- Domestic Pinduoduo take rate: 4.5-5.5% (analyst consensus; lower than Alibaba's ~6% due to value positioning)
- Domestic GMV = RMB 213-244B / 4.5-5.5% = RMB 3.9-5.4 trillion
- Temu GMV: ~$50B+ = ~RMB 360B+ (from industry sources)
- Total consolidated GMV: RMB 4.3-5.8 trillion (~$590-$800B)

Step 4: Cross-check with FY2025 Q1-Q3 run rate
- FY2025 Q1-Q3 revenue: RMB 307.9B, annualized ~RMB 420B
- If take rate stable at ~5%, implied GMV ~RMB 8.4T (but revenue growth slowed to 9%, suggesting GMV growth also slowing)

RANGE: RMB 5.3-6.6 trillion for FY2024 consolidated
DOMESTIC: RMB 3.9-5.4 trillion
TEMU: RMB 360B-500B ($50-70B)

verification.verifier_notes: Revenue is primary (XBRL). Take rate is estimated from analyst reports (3-5% range for domestic, 25-35% for Temu fully-managed). Wide range reflects uncertainty in Temu revenue split (not disclosed by PDD).
